summary.lv: HQ Multinational Division North meklē Information Environment Analyst ar zināšanām informācijas monitoringā un analīzē, OSINT, sociālo mediju analīzē vai kiberdrošības rīkos.
summary.en: HQ Multinational Division North is hiring an Information Environment Analyst with skills in information monitoring and analysis, OSINT, social media analysis or cybersecurity tooling.
